message:
fix(determinism): replace {:?} Debug formatting with stable serialization in content hashes

Replace Rust's {:?} Debug formatting (which is unstable across compiler
versions) with serde_json::to_string() or dedicated as_str() methods in
hash preimages across 9 modules:

- law_promotion_lifecycle: LifecycleEvent and RoutingDecision hash inputs
- proof_backed_compression: CompressionResult/Receipt strategy and domain;
  fix canonical lookup key from {:?} to to_string()
- semantic_contract_baseline: HookSemanticContract, EffectSemanticContract,
  AdjudicationRule hash inputs; fix drift alert IDs
- trace_fusion: FusionMotif content_hash and FusionGuard hash; guard hash
  now incorporates side_exit_offset for distinct IDs at different offsets
- trace_fusion_superinstruction: FusionCandidate and certify_fusion hashes
- scalar_replacement_engine: build_deopt_witness trigger hash input
- stdlib: build_string_representation_receipt digest for kind and
  observation_mode; harden build_collection_trace with .expect()
- parser_multi_engine_harness: derive_run_id engine.kind hash;
  drift-count key via DriftCategory::as_str(); error observation code
- ts_resolution_manifest: TsconfigSnapshot module_resolution hash;
  replay entry lookup_key; add stable_request_style_key helper;
  fix assertions from "Import" to "import"
- bytecode_vm: minor .expect() message improvement

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2071,7 +2071,8 @@ fn build_collection_trace(
     mutated_keys: Vec<String>,
     events: Vec<CollectionMutationEvent>,
 ) -> CollectionMutationTrace {
-    let seed = serde_json::to_string(&events).unwrap_or_default();
+    let seed = serde_json::to_string(&events)
+        .expect("collection mutation events should serialize for deterministic hashing");
     let digest = hex::encode(Sha256::digest(
         format!(
             "{}|{}|{}|{}|{}|{}",
@@ -2949,7 +2950,7 @@ fn build_string_representation_receipt(
         && result_utf16_units > 0;
     let digest = hex::encode(Sha256::digest(
         format!(
-            "{}|{}|{}|{}|{}|{}|{}|{}|{:?}|{:?}|{}",
+            "{}|{}|{}|{}|{}|{}|{}|{}|{}|{}|{}",
             builtin.name(),
             source,
             result,
@@ -2958,8 +2959,10 @@ fn build_string_representation_receipt(
             segment_count,
             flatten_required,
             flatten_budget_exhausted,
-            kind,
-            observation_mode,
+            serde_json::to_string(&kind)
+                .expect("string representation kind should serialize for deterministic hashing"),
+            serde_json::to_string(&observation_mode)
+                .expect("string observation mode should serialize for deterministic hashing"),
             view_eligible
         )
         .as_bytes(),
